failed_attempts.sql:
SELECT
  p.id AS profile_id,
  count(c.id) AS hate_comment_count
FROM profile p
JOIN publication pub ON p.id = pub.profile_id
JOIN comment c ON pub.id = c.publication_id
WHERE c.annotation ILIKE '%hate%' 
   OR c.annotation ILIKE '%attack%' 
   OR c.annotation ILIKE '%harass%'
GROUP BY p.id
ORDER BY hate_comment_count DESC
LIMIT 10;

failed_attempts.sql:
SELECT
  p.id AS profile_id,
  COUNT(c.id) AS hate_comment_count
FROM profile p
JOIN publication pub ON p.id = pub.profile_id
JOIN comment c ON pub.id = c.publication_id
WHERE c.annotation ILIKE '%hate%' 
   OR c.annotation ILIKE '%attack%' 
   OR c.annotation ILIKE '%harass%'
GROUP BY p.id
ORDER BY COUNT(c.id) DESC
LIMIT 10;
